data.title: Kevin Warsh Leads in Federal Reserve Chair Odds
data.description: Polymarket data indicates that Kevin Warsh currently has a 53% probability of being appointed as the next Federal Reserve Chair. According to Odaily, Rick Rieder's chances have increased to 27%, while Kevin Hassett's likelihood has decreased to 5%. Christopher Waller's probability stands at 11%.

data.title: Trump Advocates for Greenspan-Like Federal Reserve Leadership
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has expressed his preference for a Federal Reserve chair akin to Alan Greenspan, who served during the 1990s. According to NS3.AI, Trump commended Greenspan's growth-oriented and adaptable approach, indicating a desire for the Federal Reserve to reduce interest rates. This statement hints at possible changes in the central bank's monetary policy direction.

data.title: On Polymarket, the probability of Rick Rieder being elected Federal Reserve Chairman has risen to 27%.
data.description: According to Polymarket data, Kevin Warsh's probability of being elected Federal Reserve Chair is currently 53%, Rick Rieder's probability has risen to 27%, Kevin Hassett's probability has fallen to 5%, and Christopher Waller's probability is currently 11%. Related reading: "The Last Candidate for Federal Reserve Chair: Rick Rieder's Stance on Crypto?"

data.title: Trump: Hopes Hassett stays in her current position; the number of candidates for Fed Chair has been narrowed down to two or three.
data.description: US President Trump has stated his desire for Hassett, director of the White House National Economic Council, to remain in her current position. The pool of candidates for Federal Reserve Chairman has been narrowed down to two or three, and I personally believe the final choice has likely been decided. (Jinshi)

data.title: Trump: Rick Rieder and Kevin Warsh are both suitable to be the next Federal Reserve Chairman
data.description: US President Trump: Rick Riddell, BlackRock's Global Chief Fixed Income Investment Officer, and Kevin Warsh, former Federal Reserve Governor, are both suitable to serve as the next Federal Reserve Chairman. (Jinshi)

data.title: Tesla's Cybercab and Optimus Robot Production Faces Initial Slowdown
data.description: Tesla CEO Elon Musk has warned that the early production phase of the Cybercab and Optimus robot will experience delays due to the integration of numerous new components. According to NS3.AI, despite a recent weekly dip, Tesla's stock saw an upswing after it was confirmed that vehicles equipped with the AI4 chip will support unsupervised autonomous driving. Furthermore, an insurer's decision to reduce rates by 50% for Tesla drivers utilizing Full Self-Driving technology indicates growing trust in Tesla's autonomous capabilities.

data.title: Bitcoin and altcoins rally as Trump signals tariff pause, easing EU–US tensions
data.description:
Bitcoin and altcoins rallied after Donald Trump said the US would delay planned tariffs following talks with NATO, easing geopolitical pressure on risk assets.
source: https://ambcrypto.com/bitcoin-and-altcoins-rally-as-trump-signals-tariff-pause-easing-eu-us-tensions/

data.title: Bank of Italy Chief Warns Banks Must Tokenize Money to Compete with Stablecoins
data.description:
Bank of Italy Governor Fabio Panetta told the country's banking association that commercial banks must convert their money into digital tokens to remain competitive as stablecoins gain momentum, backed by strong U. S. administration support that threatens European monetary sovereignty.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/bank-of-italy-chief-warns-banks-must-tokenize-money-to-compete-with-stablecoins/

data.title: Tech Stock Bounces Back As Trump Rules Out Force In Greenland
data.description:
Technology stocks bounced on Wednesday as President Trump ruled out military force in Greenland, easing geopolitical fears that sparked a global sell-off earlier in the week.
source: https://catenaa.com/markets/equities/tech-stock-bounces-back-as-trump-rules-out-force-in-greenland/

data.title: Bitcoin Spike to $90K Boosts Crypto Liquidations Above $1 Billion as Trump Dumps Tariffs
data.description:
President Trump said Wednesday that he won't impose tariffs related to his quest for Greenland, boosting Bitcoin and stocks in the process.
source: https://decrypt.co/355325/bitcoin-spike-90k-crypto-liquidations-above-1-billion-trump-dumps-tariffs

data.title: Greenland Gambit Sparks Crypto Chaos: Tariff Threats Send Bitcoin Sliding – Analysts Eye $75K
data.description:
President Trump's threats to impose steep tariffs on eight European nations unless Denmark cedes Greenland triggered a $150 billion crypto market selloff with Bitcoin plunging to $87K, while gold surged past $4,800 per ounce in a historic flight to safety that exposed Bitcoin's continued treatment as a speculative risk asset.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/greenland-gambit-sparks-crypto-chaos-tariff-threats-send-bitcoin-sliding-analysts-eye-75k/

data.title: Iran‘s central bank acquired $507M in USDt to prop up rial: Elliptic
data.description:
The Central Bank of Iran reportedly stockpiled more than half a billion dollars worth of USDt amid escalating protests and crypto usage in the country.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/iran-central-bank-usdt-elliptic-rial?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Eric Trump Envisions U.S. as Global Crypto Hub Through Bitcoin Mining
data.description: Eric Trump has expressed that the company's Bitcoin mining operations and growing digital asset treasury could establish the United States as a leading global crypto hub. According to NS3.AI, he aims to transform America into the 'crypto capital of the world' through these efforts. This statement reflects a rising institutional interest and confidence in Bitcoin mining and digital assets among U.S. business circles.

data.title: Celsius Estate Sues TrueUSD Firms Over Alleged Misuse of Customer Deposits
data.description: The Celsius estate has initiated legal action against companies managing TrueUSD stablecoins, accusing them of using customer deposits for high-risk offshore investments. According to NS3.AI, Celsius asserts that it is unable to redeem stablecoins valued at nearly $13 million, despite liquidity support from Justin Sun's Techteryx. The accused firms have refuted the allegations, yet ongoing lawsuits and insolvency challenges at associated entities like Prime Trust have sparked apprehension regarding the stability of TrueUSD and similar stablecoins.

data.title: Celsius estate alleges TrueUSD firms gambled customer deposits
data.description:
Celsius has filed a lawsuit against Archblock, alleging that it's failed to redeem millions of dollars worth of stablecoins.
source: https://protos.com/celsius-estate-alleges-trueusd-firms-gambled-customer-deposits/

data.title: Maple Finance CEO Highlights Blockchain's Potential in Private Credit Markets
data.description: Maple Finance CEO Sidney Powell has identified the tokenization of private credit markets as the most promising application of blockchain technology. According to NS3.AI, Powell emphasized that private credit, typically characterized by its opacity and illiquidity, presents significant opportunities when integrated with blockchain. This perspective underscores a strategic shift towards leveraging blockchain to unlock illiquid financial assets.

data.title: Alphabet's Stock Experiences Slight Decline Amid Market Sentiment
data.description: Alphabet's stock recently experienced a slight decline of 2.3%, though it remains up over 4% in 2026. According to NS3.AI, this dip is seen as a potential buying opportunity, reflecting broader market risk sentiment rather than specific concerns about Google's core operations. The company's growth is anticipated to continue, driven by Waymo's expansion and investments in artificial intelligence. Analyst price targets for Alphabet vary, with optimistic projections ranging from $350 to $375, while more cautious estimates are between $279 and $300.

data.title: SBI, Startale to Launch Regulated Yen Stablecoin
data.description:
SBI and Startale plan a regulated yen stablecoin for global settlement, leveraging Japan’s FSA framework and targeting institutional adoption by mid-2026.
source: https://catenaa.com/markets/cryptocurrencies/sbi-startale-to-launch-regulated-yen-stablecoin/

data.title: Saga Halts EVM Blockchain After $7 Million Hack
data.description: Saga has suspended its EVM blockchain operations following a hacking incident that led to losses of nearly $7 million. According to NS3.AI, the attacker exploited vulnerabilities possibly linked to private key compromise or smart contract abuse, laundering the stolen funds through various bridges and swaps. This event is part of a recent increase in hacks targeting DeFi platforms, which have resulted in over $30 million in thefts since the start of 2026.

data.title: Europe formally suspends US trade arrangements over Greenland dispute with Trump
data.description:
The European Parliament has halted approval of the transatlantic trade agreement reached with the United States last July, citing President Donald Trump’s demand to buy Greenland and his threats to slap fresh tariffs on European goods. The decision came Wednesday, hours after Trump used his speech at the World Economic Forum in Davos to push […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/europe-formally-suspends-us-trade-deal/
